title: Student Council Overview
content: Student Council Instagram: @adypu.studentcouncil. Email: info.studentcouncil@adypu.edu.in. Guided by: Dean, Student Service Division (Dr. Vijay Kulkarni).

title: Student Council Office Bearers
content: Key Office Bearers: President: Mr. Devesh Dinesh Pandey. President / Rotaract Club Head: Mr. Yash Yogesh Somani. Vice Presidents: Ms. Ritul Dhanwade, Ms. Rajshree Sahay, Ms. Piyul Tejaswini Khare. Secretaries: Ms. Akansha Nair, Mr. Pratham Sharma, Mr. Atharva Gutte. Cultural Heads: Ms. Mahima Chakraborty, Ms. Achal Guha, Mr. Varad Prashant Chavan. Sports Heads: Ms. Tanishka Pramod Salunke, Mr. Lokala Charan Naga Karthik, Mr. Prajwal Sharma. Placement Heads: Mr. Varad Vijay Khopkar, Ms. Durva Mitesh Patil, Mr. Om Jeughale. Hostel Representatives: Ms. Ishita Thulkar, Mr. Bhavya Daga.

title: Student Council Eligibility & Selection
content: Eligibility for Council: Minimum CGPA 7.0+ and a clean disciplinary record. Selection process: campaigning + student voting + faculty interviews. Investiture: August/September.

title: How to Join Clubs
content: How to join clubs: Club Fair at start of academic year near the amphitheater. SSD Office: walk-in to sign up for active clubs. Digital: QR codes on campus bulletin boards or ERP notifications.

title: NSS (National Service Scheme)
content: NSS Director: Shital Dilip Solanki (Assistant Professor). Regular activities: 135 hours/year — tree plantation, blood donation, cleanliness drives. Special Camps: 7-day annual camps on rural reconstruction and literacy. Village Adoption: long-term engagement with a nearby village (health, sanitation, education). Recent projects: rejuvenation of Warje Nalla, school wall painting at Solu village.

title: Ph.D. / Doctoral Programs Details
content: Doctoral (Ph.D.) programs are available in Engineering, Management, Law, Liberal Arts, and Design. Duration: 3–6 years. Eligibility: Master’s degree with minimum 55%. Admission: PET (Research Methodology + Subject-Specific paper) + Personal Interview. Typical steps: Application (usually by March 31) → PET Exam → Personal Interview + Research Proposal Presentation. Doctoral portal: https://adypu.edu.in/doctoral-program.

title: Governing Board
content: Governing Board: Chairperson / Chancellor: Dr. Ajeenkya D Y Patil. Vice Chancellor: Dr. Rakesh Kumar Jain. Sponsoring Body Nominees: Mrs. Pooja Patil, Dr. Nandita Palshetkar, Dr. Vijay Khole, Dr. Makarand Jawadekar. Expert Nominee (IT/Mgmt): Mr. Suresh Makhija. Government of Maharashtra Nominees: Mr. Sadashiv Khade, Adv. Madan Chhajed. Industry Representatives: Mr. Pradyumna Vyas, Dr. Sudhir Mehta. Permanent Invitee (Registrar): Dr. Sudhakar Shinde.
